title: Want to hire the next Jürgen Klopp? This is how da...
summary: Clubs are expanding their use of analytics beyond player recruitment to also inform managerial hiring decisions. This shift reflects the growing embrace of data-driven decision-making in coaching selections across professional football.
content: All clubs now use analytics to sign players in the transfer window, but now some are embracing it in their managerial searches too.

zh.title: 想要雇佣下一个尤根·克洛普？这是如何...
zh.summary: 俱乐部正在扩大分析学的应用范围，从球员招募延伸到管理层招聘决策。这种转变反映了职业足球界在教练选择中越来越拥抱数据驱动决策的趋势。

title: Chasing a first Scottish title since 1960, Hearts ...
summary: Hearts FC are 90 minutes away from winning their first Scottish title since 1960, which would also be the first championship won by a non-Glasgow club in over 40 years. Their fans hope this marks the beginning of a new era of success for the club.
content: Hearts are 90 minutes from a first Scottish title since 1960 -- also a first for a club outside Glasgow in over 40 years -- or sadness. Their fans are hoping this is the start, not the end, of their challenge.

zh.title: 追求1960年以来的首个苏格兰冠军，Hearts...
zh.summary: Hearts FC距离赢得1960年以来的首个苏格兰冠军还有90分钟，这也将是40多年来非格拉斯哥俱乐部赢得的首个冠军。他们的球迷希望这标志着俱乐部成功新时代的开始。

title: Mbappé benched, booed: Coach said I'm 4th-choice
summary: Kylian Mbappé has revealed that Real Madrid coach Álvaro Arbeloa informed him he is the club's fourth-choice forward. The forward was benched in recent matches and reportedly booed by the Bernabéu crowd.
content: Kylian Mbappé said Thursday Álvaro Arbeloa told him he was Real Madrid's "fourth-choice forward" after being benched and then whistled by fans.

zh.title: 姆巴佩被排除、遭嘘：教练说我是第4选择
zh.summary: 基里安·姆巴佩透露，皇家马德里教练阿尔瓦罗·阿尔贝罗亚告诉他，他是俱乐部的第四选择前锋。这位前锋在最近的比赛中被排除在外，据报道还被伯纳乌球场的球迷嘘声。

title: France WCup squad: Camavinga out, Mateta in
summary: France manager Didier Deschamps announced his World Cup squad featuring formidable attacking talent, with goalkeeper Robin Risser earning a call-up following his breakthrough season. Notable changes include Camavinga's exclusion and Mateta's inclusion.
content: France coach Didier Deschamps assembled a squad with formidable attacking talent for the World Cup and rewarded goalkeeper Robin Risser with a call-up for the showpiece tournament following his breakthrough season.

zh.title: 法国世界杯名单：卡马文加出局，马特塔入选
zh.summary: 法国主教练迪迪埃·德尚宣布了他的世界杯大名单，其中包含强大的进攻天才，门神罗宾·里瑟因其突破性的赛季表现获得征召。值得注意的变化包括卡马文加的出局和马特塔的入选。

title: USMNT's Scally to make club call after World Cup
summary: USMNT defender Joe Scally will make a decision on his club future following the 2026 World Cup this summer. The decision suggests potential transfer movement for the player after the tournament concludes.
content: United States defender Joe Scally is going to make a call on his club future after this summer's World Cup.

zh.title: 美国国家队斯卡利将在世界杯后做出俱乐部决定
zh.summary: 美国国家队后卫乔·斯卡利将在今年夏天2026年世界杯后就他的俱乐部未来做出决定。这个决定暗示该球员在锦标赛结束后可能会转会。

title: Emery: Elliott loan from Liverpool 'embarrassing'
summary: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has criticized Harvey Elliott's loan spell from Liverpool, stating the youngster's limited playing time has been 'embarrassing for everyone involved.' The comment highlights the unsuccessful nature of the loan arrangement.
content: Aston Villa coach Unai Emery said Harvey Elliott 's lack of involvement for the club during his loan spell from Liverpool has been "embarrassing for everyone involved."

zh.title: 埃梅里：埃利奥特从利物浦租借"令人尴尬"
zh.summary: 阿斯顿维拉主教练乌奈·埃梅里批评了哈维·埃利奥特从利物浦租借的表现，称这位年轻球员的出场时间有限"对所有人来说都令人尴尬"。这一评论突显了这笔租借交易的不成功本质。

title: Brazil extend Ancelotti through 2030 World Cup
summary: Carlo Ancelotti has extended his contract as Brazil's head coach through the 2030 World Cup, committing for another four years. The renewal reinforces Brazil's confidence in the experienced manager.
content: Carlo Ancelotti has renewed his contract as Brazil coach for another four years through to the 2030 World Cup.

zh.title: 巴西将安切洛蒂合约延至2030年世界杯
zh.summary: 卡洛·安切洛蒂将其作为巴西主教练的合约延至2030年世界杯，再续约四年。此次续约加强了巴西对这位经验丰富教练的信任。

title: Gotham FC in talks to play at new NYCFC stadium
summary: Gotham FC is exploring a potential move to NYCFC's new Etihad Park stadium in Queens, New York, for the 2028 NWSL season. The relocation would provide the team with a modern dedicated venue.
content: Gotham FC is exploring a move to New York City FC's forthcoming Etihad Park in Queens, New York, for the 2028 NWSL season, ESPN confirmed.

zh.title: 哥谭足球俱乐部谈判进驻纽约城新球场
zh.summary: 哥谭足球俱乐部正探索在2028年NWSL赛季搬到纽约城足球俱乐部位于纽约皇后区的新埃蒂哈德公园球场。此次搬迁将为球队提供一座现代化的专用场地。

title: Striker Kerr to leave Chelsea at end of season
summary: Australian striker Sam Kerr will depart Chelsea when her contract expires at the end of the current season. The departure marks the end of her tenure with the English club.
content: Striker Sam Kerr will leave Chelsea when her contract expires at the end of the season.

zh.title: 前锋克尔赛季末将离开切尔西
zh.summary: 澳大利亚前锋萨姆·克尔将在本赛季末合约到期时离开切尔西。这标志着她在英超俱乐部生涯的结束。

title: Brighton, Japan star Mitoma in doubt for WCup
summary: Brighton and Japan winger Kaoru Mitoma will miss the club's final two matches of the season and could be a doubt for the World Cup. The injury raises concerns about his availability for Japan's tournament campaign.
content: Kaoru Mitoma will miss Brighton's last two matches of the season and could be a doubt for the World Cup.

zh.title: 布莱顿日本边锋三笘薫世界杯参赛存疑
zh.summary: 布莱顿和日本边锋三笘薫将缺席球队赛季最后两场比赛，世界杯参赛也可能受影响。这次伤病令人担忧他在日本世界杯队中的出场情况。

title: 👕 Man United unveil new home kit for UCL return
summary: Manchester United have unveiled their new home kit for the 2026-27 season as the club prepares for its return to the Champions League. The kit launch marks the team's preparation for competing in European football's premier competition.
content: Manchester United have rolled out their home kit for the 2026-27 season in the Premier League and their return to the Champions League.

zh.title: 👕 曼联推出新赛季主场球衣，备战欧冠回归
zh.summary: 曼彻斯特联队为2026-27赛季推出了新主场球衣，为重返欧洲足球冠军联赛做准备。球衣发布标志着球队为参加欧洲足球顶级赛事所做的充分准备。
